MARISAMOD-SPARK.title: Spark
MARISAMOD-AMPLIFY.description: When you have enough energy, spend additional energy to activate its effect.
MARISAMOD-AMPLIFY.title: Amplify
MARISAMOD-STEAL.description:
Steal a card from the [gold]draw pile[/gold] all other players.
Token will never be stolen. Prioritize cards without [blue]enchantments[/blue]. The priority of each rarity level is as follows: first steal the [blue] uncommon [/blue] card, followed by the [gold] rare[/gold]/common/[green]event [/green] card, then the basic/[pure]task[/purple] card, and finally the card that is either[gold] ancient[/gold] or with [blue]enchantment[/blue]. When none of them are satisfied, a random card will be selected from all non-token cards in the [gold]draw pile[/gold].
MARISAMOD-STEAL.title: steal card
